mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, content, sender_id, target_id, target_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{senderId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id AS userId, n.type, n.content, n.is_read AS isRead, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.sender_id AS senderId, n.target_id AS targetId, n.target_type AS targetType, u.username AS senderName, u.avatar_url AS senderAvatar FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.sender_id WHERE n.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, content, sender_id) VALUES
(#{n.userId}, #{n.type}, #{n.content}, #{n.senderId})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE status = 1
